T-001.userTest: Run `npm install && npm run build` — verify build succeeds with zero TypeScript errors
acceptanceCriteria: package.json has next: ^16.x, react: ^19.x, react-dom: ^19.x, @types/react: ^19, @types/react-dom: ^19, @vercel/analytics: ^2.x
npm install completes with exit code 0 and zero peer dependency conflict warnings
npm run build succeeds with zero TypeScript errors
src/app/layout.tsx still imports <Analytics /> without type errors
next.config.mjs has no warnings about deprecated options
npm test and npm run typecheck and npm run lint pass

coversFeatures: Upgrade all other direct dependencies to latest stable
T-002.userTest: Run `npm install && npm test` — verify all Jest tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: All direct dependencies in package.json are bumped to their latest stable versions per the PRD dependency table
npm install completes with exit code 0 and zero peer dependency conflict warnings
npm test executes all 8 component test suites
npm run build still succeeds with zero new TypeScript errors
@graphcms/rich-text-react-renderer version is the latest stable (or pinned to a React 19-compatible version)
react-social-icons version is the latest stable (or pinned if incompatible with React 19)
tailwindcss stays on v3.x
npm test runs without crashes or import errors
npm run typecheck and npm run lint pass

T-003.userTest: Run `npm run build` — verify zero TypeScript errors in build output
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build exits with code 0
Build output contains zero TypeScript compilation errors
All 5 pages compile without type errors
All components in src/components/ compile without type errors
All API modules in src/api/ compile without type errors
All type definitions in src/types/ are compatible with upgraded packages
npm test runs without TypeScript errors in test files
npm run typecheck and npm run lint pass

coversFeatures: Migrate ESLint v8 to v9 flat config
T-004.userTest: Run `npm run lint` — verify ESLint v9 runs with zero errors
acceptanceCriteria: eslint.config.js (or eslint.config.mjs) exists at project root

All existing rules are preserved in flat config: next/core-web-vitals, @typescript-eslint/recommended, prettier/recommended, jsx-a11y
eslint.config.js ignores e2e/, .next/, and node_modules/
npm run lint executes with zero errors
npm run typecheck and npm test pass

T-005.userTest: Run `npm run lint` — verify zero ESLint errors
acceptanceCriteria: npm run lint exits with code 0

setup-node action is bumped to v4 (from v2)
All CI steps (npm ci, npm run lint, npm test) reference the updated Node version

npm run typecheck and npm test pass
